name: mcp-app-io-explainer
description: MCP App that visually explains how tool inputs and outputs drive UI rendering

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build --watch" "npm run serve"
